case_title: CAPITAL CITI PROPERTIES DE, LLC VS. ELIZABETH AUSTIN

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, ELIZABETH
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, ELIZABETH
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ELIZABETH AUSTIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ELIZABETH AUSTIN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF ELIZABETH AUSTIN ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
